Name: updateUsers
SQL: WITH mutation_result AS (UPDATE "auth"."users" SET "locale" = $1::varchar, "metadata" = "metadata" || $2::jsonb WHERE users."id" = $3::uuid RETURNING *) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."locale" AS "locale", mutation_result."metadata" AS "metadata" FROM mutation_result) AS "_e"))
